title: CleanStrike PvP + SMP
description: CleanStrike PvP + SMP is a clean, performance focused Minecraft texture pack designed for competitive PvP and smooth SMP gameplay. Features clear visuals, reduced clutter, and optimized textures for better FPS while keeping a vanilla friendly look.
body:
CleanStrike PvP + SMP is a clean, vanilla-style texture pack made for both PvP and SMP players. It keeps the original Minecraft look while improving visibility and performance.

The pack features a small totem, low fire, small shield, and other subtle tweaks to reduce screen clutter during fights. Everything is designed to feel natural and not over-edited, making it great for long SMP sessions and competitive PvP.

Made with care by Battlezent, CleanStrike focuses on clarity, smooth gameplay, and a clean vanilla experience.
